sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f sizing: apply 35-55% principle when portfolio ≥ initial value (100); switch to dynamic fractional f methodology when portfolio falls below initial value. Not applicable to static fractional f. Exact formula not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be adjusted dynamically based on portfolio value relative to initial value, with the 35-55% principle applicable to optimal f and dynamic fractional f strategies but not static fractional f.
